title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-linear
description:
Final step of #245. tests/api_proof.rs exercising every public API after the orphans are wired and methods added. Coverage matrix:
- All regressors: builders, fit, predict, score, coef_/intercept_ accessors
- All classifiers: builders, fit, predict, predict_proba, predict_log_proba, decision_function, score, classes_ accessor
- IsotonicRegression: fit + predict + transform
- LDA / QDA: fit/predict/predict_proba/predict_log_proba/decision_function/score/classes
- SVC family + LinearSVC + OneClassSVM: builders + decision_function + n_support
- All public enum variants (Kernel impls, GLMFamily, Activation, Solver, LinearSVCLoss, LinearSVRLoss, LinearKernel/PolynomialKernel/RbfKernel/SigmoidKernel)
- f32 smoke
